case.title: MOORE v. CHARLOTTE-MECKLENBURG BOARD OF EDUCATION

opinion.h1: MOORE v. CHARLOTTE-MECKLENBURG BOARD OF EDUCATION, 400 U.S. 803 (1970)
opinion.p: Mrs. Robert Lee MOORE et al., appellants, v. CHARLOTTE-MECKLENBURG BOARD OF EDUCATION et al. No. 444.
Supreme Court of the United States
October 6, 1970[ Moore v. Charlotte-Mecklenburg Board of Education 400 U.S. 803 (1970) ]
